scripts.models: node scripts/run-python.mjs etl/points_model.py && node scripts/run-python.mjs etl/lineup_solver.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db && node scripts/run-python.mjs etl/dp_archive_etl.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db --since 2019-01-01 && node scripts/run-python.mjs etl/outcomes_etl.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db --seasons 2019 2025 --seed-fc && node scripts/run-python.mjs etl/project_production.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db && node scripts/run-python.mjs etl/cornering_metrics.py --db etl/data/dynasty.db
scripts.all: npm run etl && npm run models && npm run dev
scripts.legacy: cd server && npm install && node src/index.js
